name: Low Fat Spice Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Promise Ultra Fat Free Milk
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare baking sheets with cooking spray. In a mixing bowl, combine flours, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, cloves, baking soda, and salt. In another mixing bowl, combine margarine, spread, brown sugar, egg white, vanilla, and sour cream. Add dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened. Cover and chill overnight. On a heavily floured surface (dough will be slightly sticky that's why more flour is needed), roll dough 1/8 inch thickness. Using a 2 1/2 inch cutter, cut dough into desired shapes. Arrange cookies 1 inch apart on prepared baking sheets. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned. If desired, decorate cookies with Powdered Sugar Icing.
